Decoupling Services from Storage Engines Through Data Abstractions at Netflix

August 6, 2024 · talks

A talk at the Future of Memory & Storage Summit 2024 on why Netflix builds abstraction layers between application services and storage engines, and what that platform looks like in practice — control plane, data plane, and the API patterns that protect product teams from the specifics of any one database.

Slides (PDF)

← All talks

Staff Software Engineer at Netflix and founding architect of Netflix's Data Abstraction Platform. I write and speak about distributed databases, data abstractions, and platform engineering at scale.
